title: Arrival
summary: Meet the village with short, calm lines that build trust in the keyboard.
skillTheme: settling your hands and learning the home row calmly

lessons.label: Lantern Line
lessons.goal: Relax into the keyboard without chasing speed.

lessons.label: Soft Steps
lessons.goal: Keep the line moving without jabbing at the keys.
lessons.text: soft steps keep the lanterns bright

lessons.label: Open Gate
lessons.goal: Finish cleanly when punctuation appears in the line.
lessons.text: clear words, steady hands, open doors.

capstone.label: Arrival Check
capstone.goal: Prove you can stay relaxed through a slightly longer sentence.
capstone.text: quiet rhythm wakes the village one clean line at a time

unlocks.description: The first lantern path brightens around the village square.
